2332040.name: Dragon Courier
2332040.description:
Dragon Courier is an open-world RPG, influenced by classic JRPG and CRPG genres.

Story

A strong wind blows across the world and refuses to stop. Fearing a bad omen, people grow suspicious of one another as a dark age descends. Increasing corruption and greed lures out evil creatures from the mountain depths, looking to pilfer from vulnerable travelers. As a courier for the Dragon Dispatch, you provide secure delivery of goods. Start with simple tasks and build towards bigger jobs, taking you across the world into the middle of a larger story.

Features


  • Large Open-World Exploration
  • Strategic Turn-Based Combat
  • Diverse Quests
  • Rich Storyline
  • Dungeon Crawling
  • Cloud Saving
  • Controller Support
  • Fishing!
